review_snippet: Have been going here regularly for about a year. New owners took over recently and are trying to turn it into a biker bar. \n\nProblem is the service
key_insight: Since the new owners took over, service has slowed and become unfriendly, which the reviewer says is below average despite the food staying consistent.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your experience and for being a regular customer for the past year. We’re sorry the service has not met expectations since the ownership change, and we’ll address the speed and friendliness concerns with our team. We’d appreciate the chance to welcome you back and show you the improvements—please feel free to reach out so we can make it right.

review_snippet: I have tried this place twice.  It is very popular, always crowded, and has a nice ambiance.  That being said, plain and simple- the food is bad.  The
key_insight: The reviewer enjoyed the ambiance but found the food mediocre—specifically calling the chicken marsala the worst they’ve had—and felt the pricing ($16 for marsala, $12–15 for pizza) wasn’t good value compared to other local options.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your experience. We’re sorry the chicken marsala didn’t meet expectations and that the pricing felt out of line with the quality you received. We’d welcome the opportunity to make it right—please reach out so we can learn more about your visit and ensure future meals are better.

review_snippet: If you like overpriced food that really isn't that good, a wait staff that is snobby and a cliental that is a bunch of want-a-bees that somehow paying
key_insight: The reviewer criticizes the food as overpriced and not very good, and also complains about snobby wait staff and an unpleasant customer atmosphere.
business_response: We’re sorry to hear your experience didn’t meet expectations. We take feedback about food quality, pricing, and service seriously, and we’d welcome the opportunity to learn more so we can address your concerns with our team. Thank you for sharing your perspective.

review_snippet: I think I must have been there the same day as Ron H!!  As Ron mentioned, this is Spring Training time in Scottsdale.  There actually aren't that many
key_insight: Guests were seated and ignored, with significant service delays and poor attention to table management. Food quality issues included missing advertised bacon and extremely salty bacon, plus slow resolution when a remake was requested.
business_response: Thank you for sharing these details. We’re sorry for the delays, the lack of attentive service, and the issues with your order—especially the missing bacon and the excessive saltiness. We’d like to make this right; please contact us so we can review what happened and ensure our team is properly supported during busy Spring Training periods.

review_snippet: CHEATERS\n\nThat's the best way I can describe my experience yesterday at this location. I was upgrading to an iPhone 5 and trading in my iPhone 4. Th
key_insight: The reviewer says the store offered a trade-in value but required purchasing multiple accessories before the remaining balance could be applied, which they claim was out of Verizon policy and felt like upselling. They also mention being shown accessories immediately and being treated as if they didn’t know product differences.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your experience. We’re sorry for the confusion regarding your trade-in and accessory requirements, and we take concerns about policy and customer treatment seriously. Please contact us so we can review what happened and work toward a resolution.

review_snippet: Ok I first want to say yes. Their food is delicious and I have eaten here several times. The sad thing is this. Today my family and I went here for lu
key_insight: The food is praised as delicious, but the review is strongly negative due to the restaurant refusing to honor a military discount because it wasn’t Monday, which offended the veteran customer and led to them walking out.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your experience, and we’re glad you’ve enjoyed our food in the past. We’re sorry we didn’t handle the military discount request appropriately during your visit—your family’s service is appreciated, and we understand how disappointing this was. We’d like to make this right; please contact us so we can review what happened and discuss a resolution.

review_snippet: When I went to the website to become a \"Wino\" I was expecting to sample some of the better street wines such Night Train, Thunderbird, MD 20/20 and
key_insight: The reviewer felt the experience didn’t match expectations for sampling inexpensive street wines, and they were disappointed by the vineyard tour and $20+ bottle pricing, calling it a waste of time and money.
business_response: We’re sorry the experience didn’t meet your expectations. Our tours focus on curated vineyard tastings and premium selections, and we’d like the opportunity to review what was communicated during booking so we can better align future guests’ expectations. If you’re willing, please contact us so we can learn more and address your concerns.

review_snippet: Don't get me wrong, the gym itself is lovely, the facilities are great, the staff are polite and helpful on the whole. \n\nBUT, they are incredibly po
key_insight: The reviewer praises the gym facilities and staff but reports severe issues with customer service and billing ethics, claiming they were sent to a debt collection agency for a membership they believed ended after a 3-month trial.
business_response: We’re sorry for the distress this situation caused. We take billing and customer communication seriously and would like to review the membership terms, account history, and any correspondence with the collections agency to ensure everything was handled correctly. Please contact us with the reviewer’s details so we can investigate and work toward a resolution.

review_snippet: This place is the worst customer service check out ever! It is  12:00pm Sunday and you only have two people ringing? Ok I'll give you maybe people cal

business_response: We’re very sorry for the experience you had during your visit and for the extended wait at checkout. That is not the level of service we aim to provide, and we will address the staffing and customer-handling concerns with our team. We appreciate you sharing this feedback and would like the opportunity to make it right—please contact us so we can review what happened in detail.

review_snippet: We stopped by on a whim. Mistake. 25 minutes between appetizer and main course. No explanation. No apology. Food was good, but not worth that kind of
key_insight: The reviewer experienced a long 25-minute wait between the appetizer and main course with no explanation or apology, making the meal feel not worth the delay despite good food.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your experience. We’re sorry for the 25-minute gap between courses and for not communicating or apologizing during the wait—this isn’t the level of service we aim to provide. We’re glad you enjoyed the food, and we’d appreciate the chance to make it right on your next visit.

review_snippet: Now listen, I don't normally write reviews about places and basic as a Dunkin Donuts, but I'll make an exception in this case.  If you are ever having
key_insight: The customer experienced extreme service delays and confusion at the register due to language barriers, resulting in an incorrect order and multiple attempts to fix it. The coffee was served ice-cold and the bagel arrived plain (not toasted and without cream cheese).
business_response: We’re very sorry for the frustration and delays you experienced during your visit. This is not the level of service we aim to provide, and we’d like to review what happened with the register, order accuracy, and coffee preparation. Please contact us with the date/time of your visit so we can investigate and make this right.

review_snippet: Fuck. This. Place.\n\nI bought two Amazon Local gift certificates to use here. The first visit, we weren't brought any silverware or condiments. After
key_insight: Severe service failures (no silverware/condiments, drinks not refilled, ignored for 35 minutes) combined with poor food quality (bitter crab stew and blue crabs that were difficult to eat).
business_response: We’re very sorry for the experience you described, including the lack of attention from our staff and the issues with your food. This is not the level of service or quality we aim to provide, and we’d like the opportunity to make this right—please contact us with the date of your visits and any details from your gift certificates so we can investigate and improve.

review_snippet: AWFUL experience today...long story short, I am looking for a new dentist. I love our old one, but he's a little far from our house...so, I started by

business_response: We’re very sorry for the distress this visit caused. Service animals are important, and we take accessibility concerns seriously—our team will review what was communicated to ensure compliance and respectful treatment. If the reviewer is willing, please contact our office so we can discuss the situation and work toward a resolution.

review_snippet: I wish I could leave a review of the food, but I didn't get a chance to have any.  I entered the restaurant a couple of weeks ago, craving a gyro, and
key_insight: The reviewer was not greeted or helped at the hostess stand despite staff seeing them, leading to a long wait and them leaving without ordering.

We’ll address this with our team to ensure the hostess stand is properly staffed and guests are greeted promptly. key_insight: The reviewer says the food is bland and tasteless, specifically calling out the BBQ pork and jerk fried rice as lacking flavor and being unexciting.

review_snippet: Ever get that feeling the customer is really interfering with the bartenders work?  Yeah me to, this place is a joke.
key_insight: The reviewer feels the service experience was poor and that customers were interfering with the bartenders’ work, calling the place a “joke.”
business_response: We’re sorry to hear your experience didn’t meet expectations. We strive to keep service smooth and welcoming, and we’d like the opportunity to learn more about what happened during your visit so we can address it with our team. Thank you for sharing your feedback.

review_snippet: One thing I found it interesting is, you paid arms and legs in these kind of hotel restaurant, but the food doesn't taste good at all. \n\nWe came her

business_response: Thank you for sharing your experience, and we’re sorry your Christmas Day visit didn’t meet expectations. We understand the concerns about wait times and food quality, and we’ll review our service flow and kitchen standards to improve. We appreciate your feedback and hope you’ll give us another chance to provide a better experience.

review_snippet: This is my first time dining here. My friends have been raving about how good this place is so I decided to try it with other friends who have eaten h
key_insight: The all-you-can-eat sushi and oysters were not fresh, with reports of poor sauce and inconsistent sea urchin appearance. The service also made ordering mistakes, and the seating felt overly cramped.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your experience and for the specific details. We’re sorry the sushi, oysters, and sea urchin did not meet freshness and presentation expectations, and that there was confusion with your order—this is not the standard we aim for. We’d like to speak with you directly to review what happened and improve our process; please contact us so we can make this right.

review_snippet: I am a 22 year old female. This is one of the worst hotels i have ever stayed at on the strip. The shopping obviously is great. We had to wait 45 minu
key_insight: Guests experienced extremely slow check-in and consistently rude, unaccommodating customer service (especially at Qua Spa and the gift shop), along with multiple billing/charge issues. The situation escalated during a serious illness, where front desk support and healthcare coordination were perceived as incorrect and unhelpful.
business_response: We’re very sorry to hear about your experience and the distress you went through during your stay. Your feedback regarding check-in delays, spa staff conduct, and the assistance provided when you were ill has been shared with the appropriate teams for immediate review. We would like the opportunity to learn more about your visit and help make this right—please contact us with your reservation details so we can investigate thoroughly.

review_snippet: We paid $250.00 for our room and there was no hair dryer, not enough towels, mold on the ceiling in the shower,  on the shower curtain liner, and dirt

We will address this with our housekeeping team to ensure rooms are properly stocked and thoroughly inspected before guest arrival.

review_snippet: Table 10 did not meet my requirements for bomb Louisiana/Mississippi Delta food \n\nWe went because its a Creole and Cajun place and I like that kind
key_insight: The reviewer found the food too basic and lacking flavor (shrimp po boy not standout, truffle mac not comparable to another restaurant) and also noted service was a bit slow, though they liked the decor and wine/bar area.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your experience. We’re sorry the shrimp po boy and truffle mac didn’t meet your expectations and that service felt slow during your lunch visit. We’ll review this feedback with our team and hope you’ll give us another chance—especially for a drink or a different menu selection—so we can provide the standout flavors and pace you’re looking for.

review_snippet: Like an Ihop or Denny's inside Monte Carlo, but not as good. Not expensive, but we should of went to the food court that was around the corner, better

review_snippet: Got there early. It was realy dead. I'm sure if the night were to continue on it may have gotten beter, but we left. Music was nothing really to remem

review_snippet: When I sat down I noticed my tiny plate had old wasabi crust on it,but no worries I was politely given another one.Well I liked this place because It

We’ll review our food preparation and flavor profiles to ensure our sushi meets expectations, and we appreciate your positive feedback about the bento boxes and convenient location.

review_snippet: A disappointment. Chicken finger dinner consisted of two pathetic chicken strips and soggy fries. Bf had the catfish and was not blown away by it. Not
key_insight: The chicken finger dinner was disappointing, with only two small chicken strips and soggy fries; overall food quality didn’t meet expectations, though the okra was the only decent item.

We’d like the opportunity to make this right—please contact us with your visit details so we can review what happened and improve. Thank you for sharing your feedback, and we hope you’ll give us another chance.

review_snippet: This place used to be quite good but I think they may have had an ownership change recently.  Over the past 12 months or so we have seen the quality o
key_insight: The reviewer reports a recent ownership change and says food quality and service have declined over the past year, citing poor fajitas, inconsistent drinks, and very bad service when the bar crowd gets busy, with the manager seemingly avoiding customers.
business_response: Thank you for sharing this feedback. We’re sorry to hear your experience has fallen below expectations—especially regarding food quality, drink consistency, and service during busy periods. We’d like the opportunity to make this right; please contact us so we can review what happened and work to improve immediately.

review_snippet: High praises for the attentive service and friendly staff, but that's about it.\n\nThe experience began with cocktails; a fruit martini tasting almost
key_insight: While the staff was attentive and friendly, multiple dishes and drinks were poorly executed—cocktails were unbalanced, the lobster salad had very little lobster, the salmon lacked expected cedar-plank flavor and was served with soggy couscous, and the duck arrived undercooked/rare. The server also didn’t offer a dessert menu, and management presence felt more like oversight than guest check-in.
business_response: Thank you for sharing these detailed notes. We’re glad our team was responsive in correcting the duck, but we’re disappointed that the cocktails and several dishes didn’t meet expectations, and that dessert wasn’t offered. We’d like to speak with you directly to understand what happened and ensure improvements—please contact us so we can follow up.

review_snippet: I started going here since the place opened a few years ago. There was no other Chinese place in Surprise (that I knew of) at the time. Oil is definit
key_insight: The reviewer enjoys the orange chicken and lo mein but found some dishes (like a beef dish) to be poor, notes that lunch specials are pricey, and mentions limitations such as not taking American Express and the owner being on the phone while taking orders.

We’re glad you’ve enjoyed our orange chicken and lo mein, and we’re sorry to hear the beef dish didn’t meet your expectations. We’ll also review our lunch pricing and service flow, and we appreciate the feedback about payment options—please feel free to reach out so we can help suggest vegetarian-friendly choices.

review_snippet: I go to this CVS pretty often because of how close it is to where I live and because it's got overall pretty decent prices when it comes to beer and c
key_insight: The reviewer praises convenient location and decent prices for beer/champagne, but reports feeling unsafe in the mornings due to aggressive individuals demanding money near the back entrance and around where they lock their bike.

I chill at White Castle 'cause it's the best

review_snippet: Although I still believe that the front desk staff at the Concourse have serious communication and follow-up issues, I must say that Customer Service

We’re sorry for the communication and follow-up issues you encountered, and we appreciate you recognizing the effort Stephanie made to listen, document your concerns, and work toward a resolution. review_snippet: It's getting harder to find awesome deals for meals in Vegas.  Gone are the days you can get buffets for $5 or prime rib dinners for $7.99.  Oh Sahara

review_snippet: Everybody loves this place, and maybe because of all the word of mouth i was expecting something spectacular, but i was just kind of like, oh, so this

review_snippet: This place is close to my work, so I go here sometimes because I like Chevron.  My only complaints are that their gas pumps are SLOW - and about 25% o
key_insight: The reviewer likes the convenience and Chevron brand, but complains that the gas pumps are slow and that about 25% of the time the card swipe at the pump fails, requiring payment at the counter.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your experience. We’re sorry for the delays and the card-swipe issues you encountered—this is not the level of service we aim to provide. We’ll review the pump/payment system performance and work to ensure transactions at the pump are smooth and efficient; if you’d like, please contact us with the date/time of your visit so we can investigate further.

review_snippet: Just came to pass the time with a drink. Nice location on the grand canal inside the Venetian, great ambience. \n\nThe margarita, advertised as \"the
key_insight: The venue and ambience were praised, and while the Classic margarita was considered too syrupy and not the “best in town,” the jalapeño-infused margarita was a clear improvement with fresher ingredients and a more interesting flavor.
business_response: Thank you for the thoughtful review and for sharing your experience. We’re glad you enjoyed the ambience and found the jalapeño-infused margarita to be a step up—your feedback about the Classic being too syrupy is especially helpful. We’ll be sure to pass this along to our team and look forward to welcoming you back for another drink on your next visit.

review_snippet: Now this is a true dive.  I believe the sign out front says that they open at 6a.m.  And no, they don't open that early to serve you scrambled eggs an
key_insight: The reviewer loved the authentic dive-bar vibe and described it as a must-visit during a dive bar crawl, noting the bar feels random and unpretentious with an older, heavy-drinking crowd.
business_response: Thank you for the great review and for capturing the true dive-bar experience so well. We’re glad you enjoyed the atmosphere and the Moscow Mule conversation—hope to see you again on your next crawl!

review_snippet: Not bad. Fairly small location. Staff was friendly, selection is kind of lacking.
key_insight: The staff was friendly, but the store is fairly small and the product selection feels lacking.
business_response: Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re glad you found our staff friendly, and we appreciate your comments about our space and selection. We’ll review how we can better optimize our offerings to serve you more effectively—please feel free to share any specific items you’d like to see.

review_snippet: So I came back today, a week later, and it Was kind of disappointing when I didn't  see them making new dishes. I sat and literally waited and counted
key_insight: The reviewer was disappointed that no new dishes were added to the sushi-go-round during their 30–40 minute visit, leading to dry-looking rolls and a sense that items were only replenished after the belt was cleared.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your experience. We’re sorry that the sushi-go-round was not replenished as expected during your visit and that the rolls you saw appeared dry. We’ll review our replenishment process with the team to ensure fresh items are added consistently, and we’d appreciate the chance to welcome you back—please feel free to ask our staff for recommendations on specialty rolls.

review_snippet: Grassroots was an enjoyable experience.  Good food, good service and nice decor. I had the grilled shrimp and jalape\u00f1o cheddar grits.  The grits
key_insight: The reviewer praised the overall experience—good food, good service, and nice decor—with standout dishes (grits and heirloom tomatoes), but felt the meal was enjoyable without anything exceptional enough to prompt a quick return.
business_response: Thank you for the thoughtful review and for highlighting our food, service, and decor. We’re glad the grilled shrimp and jalapeño cheddar grits (and your wife’s tuna with heirloom tomatoes) were standout favorites. We hope you’ll visit again soon so we can create a meal worth “raving about” on your next visit.

review_snippet: I couldn't agree more with the previous 5 or so reviews.  This side of town desperately needs a better grocery store.  Yes, Rollins is too expensive,
key_insight: The reviewer criticizes Rollins for being too expensive, having a weak selection, and often poor produce, but praises the convenient location, good hours, friendly staff, and reliability for quick items like detergent and cough drops.
business_response: Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re glad our convenient location, helpful and friendly team, and reliable everyday items have been able to meet your needs, and we’re pleased you’ve found our Mexican food selections as well. We’ll also take your comments about pricing, selection, and produce quality seriously as we work to improve—please feel free to reach out if there are specific items you’d like us to carry or stock more consistently.

review_snippet: I love the shops here but it is such a pain in the ass if you ever want run in to grab something and jet out due to the (weird) strategic layout thank
key_insight: The reviewer loves the variety of shops and dining, but finds the mall layout confusing and frustrating for quick trips, with particularly poor parking during holidays.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your feedback—we’re glad you enjoy browsing and dining with colleagues. We’re sorry the layout and parking made your visits feel difficult, especially during peak holiday times. We’ll pass this along to our team to help improve wayfinding and the overall guest experience for those who are in a hurry.

review_snippet: Bacchanal has a lot of food options but there weren't really any dishes that stood out to me. So, if you prefer quantity over quality, then this is th
key_insight: The reviewer liked the efficient check-in and wait-time texting process, but felt the food lacked standout dishes and preferred quantity over quality.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your experience. We’re glad you appreciated our streamlined check-in process and the convenience of waiting while you explore the Forum Shops. We’ll take your feedback about the menu and dish variety to heart, and we hope you’ll consider giving Bacchanal another try in the future.

review_snippet: Ok, this place is cool inside ... LOL ... get it?  But it's small and it's pricey to get into.  I mean, exactly how long can a person hang out in here
key_insight: The reviewer says the venue is small and overpriced, with high entry costs and expensive photo charges. They also mention discomfort due to feeling too cold during the visit.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re glad you enjoyed the experience inside, and we’re sorry it felt too small or pricey for your visit. We’ll review our pricing and guest comfort details to ensure the experience is enjoyable and worthwhile for everyone.

review_snippet: I'm giving it a 3-stars for the Chai Latte that I ordered.  It was delicious and instantly warmed me.  Not too sweet which I like.  \n\nThe service...
key_insight: The chai latte was delicious—well-balanced and not too sweet—but the service felt rushed and standoff-ish, and there was no music playing, which hurt the overall experience.
business_response: Thank you for sharing your feedback—we’re glad you enjoyed the chai latte and that it hit the right balance for you. We’re sorry the service felt rushed and standoff-ish; we’ll coach our team to be more welcoming and unhurried, even when the line is short. We’ll also review our in-store music setup to ensure the atmosphere matches what you expect.

review_snippet: I'm conflicted about bumping this rating up to four stars, but will wait until year's end to see if the above average service I've experienced here in
key_insight: The store has strong positives—fresh produce, a clean and well-displayed layout, and an excellent meat counter with helpful, non-condescending guidance—but customer service at checkout has been inconsistent (ranging from apathetic to attentive).
business_response: Thank you for the thoughtful review and for highlighting what we’re doing well—our fresh produce, clean store, and especially the meat counter team’s service. We’re glad checkout service has been improving recently, and we’ll continue working to ensure consistency across all departments. We appreciate you giving us the chance to earn that extra star as you see continued progress.

review_snippet: Summary: A great arrangement of mostly Asian influenced flavors that provides new takes on relatively familiar dishes. But what I also like about this
key_insight: The reviewer praises the restaurant’s creative Asian-influenced flavors and standout textures, highlighting exceptional edamame, a perfect heirloom tomato salad with tender steak, and crisp charred bok choy. They also compliment the bartender’s friendliness and strong recommendations, noting the tomato soup was a bit too sweet but overall the experience was outstanding.
business_response: Thank you so much for the thoughtful and detailed review! We’re thrilled you loved the flavors and textures—especially the edamame, heirloom tomato salad with steak, and charred bok choy. We’ll be sure to share your feedback with our team, and we hope to welcome you back soon as a regular spot when you’re in Summerlin.

review_snippet: I wish we would have stayed here both nights. We arrived and stayed here our first night... in attempts to stay closer to the strip we went to the Ela

business_response: Thank you for sharing your experience! We’re delighted to hear you enjoyed our convenient location next to the tram and found it easy to reach the Strip. We’d love to welcome you back for a second stay—please reach out directly so we can help make your next visit even better.

review_snippet: As much as it was mentioned in every single tourist guide i could find of Charlotte, this is a homey, family restaurant with soul and a great vibe to
key_insight: Guests loved the homey, family-run atmosphere and friendly, down-to-earth staff, plus swift service and delicious food. The fried pickles were specifically praised as an outstanding surprise.
business_response: Thank you so much for the wonderful review! We’re thrilled you enjoyed our homey vibe, friendly service, and delicious food—especially our fried pickles. We can’t wait to welcome you back for another round!

review_snippet: Needs to turn on their fans for lunch dining area because its super hot in Tempe area. Overall, i like the music atmosphere is amazing. Customer servi

business_response: Thanks for the feedback—our team will look into ensuring the dining area fans are turned on during lunch service, especially during hot Tempe days. We’re glad you enjoyed the music atmosphere and our burgers, and we’ll continue working to improve service during peak rush hours.

review_snippet: This place's bagels are just incredible.  They are fresh, chewy, and made on-site.  I had \"The Sexy\" which was awesome.  The owner rang me up and wa

business_response: Thank you so much for the wonderful review! We’re thrilled you enjoyed our fresh, made-on-site bagels and that “The Sexy” hit the mark. We’ll be sure to share your kind words with our team—hope to see you again soon!

review_snippet: I was in North Carolina for work and a large group of us (20 or so people) came to Queen City to get some bbq. I was really happy with the experience,
key_insight: Great group experience with fun trivia, well-priced drinks, and delicious ribs; fried pickles and hush puppies were also praised. Only minor downside was the collard greens not being a favorite, with a preference for the corn next time.
business_response: Thank you for the wonderful review! We’re thrilled you and your group enjoyed the trivia, drinks, and our ribs, and we appreciate you sharing your feedback on the collard greens. Next time, we’d love to have you try the corn—we’ll be sure it’s just as delicious as you remember!

review_snippet: Really like this place!  You aren't going to find a Speedy Gonzales on the menu, that's for sure.  Fresh, interesting food, friendly waitstaff and gre

key_insight: The reviewer praises the poutine variety and topping selection, highlighting specific favorites like La Bacon, and notes the food is very filling and worth the visit. They also appreciate the option to eat in or take out and the nearby picnic spot by the lake.

review_snippet: Great place to get that hard to find spice type of stuff.

review_snippet: This place is pretty good. I was surprised. The service was just ok though.

key_insight: Great value and service experience with the Groupon membership—unlimited washes, included towel exchange, air/vacuums, and even a free wax when asked. Minor wishes were the inability to pause the tunnel for extra wheel attention and slightly later opening hours.
